title: White House Releases National AI Policy Framework Urging Federal Preemption of State Laws
detail: On March 20, 2026, the White House released a legislative blueprint for a national artificial intelligence policy framework. The framework urges Congress to adopt a federally unified, innovation-first regulatory regime that preempts state AI laws. It recommends a 'light-touch' approach centered on targeted federal standards in child safety, digital replicas, and infrastructure — effectively blocking the patchwork of state AI regulations emerging across the country.

title: Trump Signs 'Preserving America's Game' Executive Order
detail: President Trump signed an Executive Order titled 'Preserving America's Game' on March 20, 2026. The order is part of Trump's broader cultural policy agenda. It represents the 250th executive order of Trump's second term, having surpassed the 220 executive orders signed across his entire first term.

media.source: Wikipedia / List of executive orders in the second Trump presidency
